name: Honey Beer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in orange juice, apple butter, and honey.
5. Mix in sifted dry ingredients alternately with beer, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
6. Fold in raisins and nuts that have been coated with flour.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
9. Sprinkle top and sides with confectioners' sugar.
